title: [codereview-2] schema.json: ccp_vector properties added for ccp15.json fields (rssi_dbm, per, snr_samples, hash_32_example etc); good coverage but missing 'type' field for some vectors and no allOf conditional required fields like in meshtastic vectors. P3 readability
close_reason: Updated test/vectors/schema.json: added missing properties (rssi_dbm, per, snr_samples, hash_32_example, name), documented 'type', set allOf with conditional required per-type (mirroring meshtastic_app_compat_vector pattern for readability). additionalProperties:true preserved for compatibility. Addresses P3 codereview-2. Commit bb6073653.
